name: Standard Checkout – Happy Path
description: Complete checkout flow with valid card, standard shipping, no promo code. Expects order confirmation.

steps.name: Add item to cart
steps.target: product page → Add to Cart button
steps.nova_act_prompt: Go to the product page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and click the 'Add to Cart' button
steps.expected: Item appears in cart with quantity 1

steps.name: Open cart
steps.nova_act_prompt: Click the cart icon in the top right corner
steps.expected: Cart drawer or page opens showing 1 item

steps.name: Proceed to checkout
steps.expected: Checkout page loads with shipping address form

steps.name: Fill shipping address
steps.nova_act_prompt: Fill in the shipping address: John Doe, 123 Main St, San Francisco, CA 94105
steps.expected: All address fields populated, form valid

steps.name: Enter payment details
steps.nova_act_prompt: Enter test card number 4111111111111111, expiry 12/27, CVV 123

steps.name: Review order
steps.nova_act_prompt: Verify the order summary shows the correct item, shipping, and total

steps.name: Place order
steps.expected: Order confirmation page with order number
